content: LGPD for sensitive transcripts: encryption at rest and in transit; least-privilege access with audit logs; defined retention with secure deletion at end of purpose; deletion-on-demand workflow (Art. 18); crypto-shredding (per-tenant or per-record keys, delete key to render data unreadable) is an accepted technique especially with immutable backups; pseudonymization where feasible. Legal-case conversations may contain 'dados sensiveis' so shorter retention and strong controls are advised.
